channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US may attack Iran again: Trump
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump says US may strike Iran again but that Tehran wants deal
- Chances for agreement with Iran appear very good right now — Trump
- Trump says US may strike Iran again but that Tehran wants deal
- Trump Says He Authorized New Strikes on Iran, but Has Decided to Hold Off
- Trump says there’s a ‘good chance’ of Iran nuclear deal after delaying strike
- Trump says US may strike Iran again but that Tehran wants deal - Reuters
- Trump says he was hour from resuming Iran strikes before postponing offensive Monday
- Trump threatens ‘a big hit’ if Tehran does not make deal soon
- Trump claims Xi will not arm Iran as strike threat looms
- Trump says US may attack Iran again but that Tehran wants deal
- US, Iran trade threats but Trump says Tehran wants peace deal
- Trump threatens Iran with ‘big hit’ if there’s no deal soon
- Trump Admits Iran Retains Ability to Launch Retaliatory Strikes
- Trump says US may need to hit Iran again
- Trump Says He Postponed a ‘Very Major Attack’ on Iran, Leaving Mideast on Edge
- Iran Warns Against Renewed US Attacks As Trump Says Held Off Assault
- Trump says US could strike Iran again within days without deal
- Trump says US was close to launching new strike on Iran
- Trump says Iran attack on ‘hold’: What we know about latest negotiations
- Trump claims Xi will not arm Iran as strike threat looms
- Iran warns against new US attacks as Trump says held off assault
- US Could Launch Attacks Against Iran as Early as Friday - Trump

- Iran warns of swift response after Trump says he halted planned attack
- US Iran may be close to deal: Trump
- Trump Says He Postponed a ‘Very Major Attack’ on Iran, Leaving Mideast on Edge
- 'We were ready for a MAJOR Attack, then…’: Trump reveals why Iran strike was suddenly halted
- Trump Cancels Planned Attack on Iran, Citing ‘Serious Negotiations’
- Trump says he called off attack on Iran planned for Tuesday
- Trump says he paused attack on Iran, signals a nuclear deal may be possible
- Trump’s repeated ultimatums betray his lack of leverage over Iran
- Donald Trump says held off on new Iran attack, upbeat for agreement
- Trump says planned Iran strike paused amid ongoing negotiations
- Trump Puts Planned Attack on Iran on Hold
- Trump says no US military strikes on Iran Tuesday as allies push for deal
- Iran war live: Trump says Iran attack postponed at request of Gulf allies
- Trump says U.S., Iran may be close to deal]]>

- Russia holds massive drills of its nuclear forces as Ukraine steps up its drone attacks
- Russia conducting 3 days of major nuclear drills
- Russia Launches Large-Scale Nuclear Forces Drills Across Multiple Military Branches
- Russia holds massive drills of its nuclear forces as Ukraine steps up its drone attacks
- Russia conducts major nuclear drills
- Moscow begins nuclear drills as Russia-Ukraine drone strikes intensify
- Russia Begins Major Nuclear Drills

item.title: Iran warns it will 'open new fronts' against US in the event of another attack
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran’s military warns will ‘open new fronts’ if US resumes attack
- Iranian army warns of opening ‘new fronts’ if attacked again
- Iranian Army Threatens to Open New Fronts If US Aggression Repeated
- Urgent: Iranian army vows to "open new fronts" against U.S. if attacks renew -- media
- Flash: Iranian army vows to "open new fronts" against U.S. if attacks renew -- media
- Iran army warns will 'open new fronts' against US if attacks resume
- Iran army warns it will 'open new fronts' against US if attacks resume
- Iran Prepares 'New Tactical Steps' in Event of US Attack - Source]]>
